summary: P1 Features Testing Complete - All three P1 tasks implemented and working: 1) Accounting module with journal entry form (PGCA), 2) User/Partner tier system with upgrade/downgrade, 3) Restaurant search and cuisine filters. Backend: 24/25 tests passed (1 expected failure). Frontend: All UI flows verified.

minor.issue: Returns 400 'Usuário já é parceiro' if user is already registered as partner
minor.note: This is expected behavior, not a bug

issues: Missing data-testid attributes on email/password inputs - recommend adding for test automation

passed_tests: ✅ Landing page loads with TudoAqui branding
✅ POST /api/auth/login authenticates users with session cookies
✅ GET /api/user/tier returns current user tier (default: normal)
✅ GET /api/restaurants returns restaurant list (4 seeded restaurants)
✅ POST /api/partners/register creates partner with basico tier
✅ Frontend: Restaurant page shows search bar and cuisine filter pills
✅ Frontend: Profile page shows user tier section with upgrade/downgrade buttons
✅ Frontend: Journal entry form at /accounting/new-entry shows PGCA accounts dropdown
✅ Frontend: Premium badge displays on Profile when user is premium tier
seed_data_creation: 4 restaurants seeded automatically when GET /api/restaurants called
context_for_next_testing_agent: P1 features fully tested: Accounting module (PGCA chart, journal entries), User tier system (normal/premium with upgrade/downgrade), Restaurant search (search bar + cuisine filters). User test@tudoaqui.ao is registered and already has premium tier. Also registered as partner for accounting access. All endpoints are session-based auth using cookies.

mocked_apis.note: Payment gateways (Multicaixa, Unitelmoney, BAI Paga) and external integrations (Tupuca, Mano) are MOCKED/simulated
